meta_text: Grouped by experiment type, environment configuration, task configuration, and traffic network
hero_text: OpenURB benchmarks mixed traffic where human-driven vehicles optimize individual travel time while AVs collaborate to minimize group travel time under dynamic population shifts. Leaderboards below compare algorithms across environment configurations, different tasks, and traffic networks using benchmark KPIs.
controls_hint: Click a column to sort | Click again to toggle direction
footer_hint: Preview hover works best in Google Chrome.

metric_descriptions.t_pre: Avg travel time before mutation (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_test: Avg travel time in testing phase (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_train: Avg travel time during training phase (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_CAV: Avg travel time of CAVs in testing phase (minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_HDV_pre: Avg travel time of humans before mutation (minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_HDV_test: Avg travel time of humans in testing phase (minutes).
metric_descriptions.CAV_advantage: Ratio of human test time to CAV test time (>1 favors CAVs).
metric_descriptions.Effect_of_change: Ratio of human pre-mutation time to CAV test time.
metric_descriptions.Effect_of_remaining: Ratio of human pre-mutation time to human test time.
metric_descriptions.avg_speed_pre: Avg speed before mutation from SUMO (km/h).
metric_descriptions.avg_speed_test: Avg speed in testing phase from SUMO (km/h).
metric_descriptions.avg_mileage_pre: Avg route length before mutation from SUMO (km).
metric_descriptions.avg_mileage_test: Avg route length in testing phase from SUMO (km).
metric_descriptions.winrate: Share of training episodes where CAVs are faster than humans.
metric_descriptions.cost_of_learning: Avg per-agent travel-time spread during training (minutes).
metric_descriptions.avg_time_lost: Avg time lost after mutation across all agents (minutes).
metric_descriptions.avg_human_time_lost: Avg time lost after mutation for humans (minutes).
metric_descriptions.avg_CAV_time_lost: Avg time lost after mutation for CAVs (minutes).
metric_descriptions.diff_sumo_routerl: SUMO avg duration minus RouteRL avg test travel time.
